services.description: Mobile Banking API entry point seeded from the /srv service control script.

certification.notes: Real service contract from Mobile Banking startup/status script. Enable diagnostics/restart only after the light agent URL and owner approval are configured.

services.description: Authentication service that the startup script intentionally starts before the rest of the Mobile Banking fabric.

certification.notes: Validate auth endpoint, token issuer health, and dependency checks before diagnostics-ready certification.

services.description: Customer/profile service started after OAuth during Mobile Banking fabric boot.

certification.notes: Validate profile lookup dependencies and database access before enabling root-cause confidence above observe-only.

services.description: USSD channel service. Real logs show ATE-Trace-ID lines and Hikari/PostgreSQL connection leak evidence.

certification.notes: First production target for light-agent log extraction because logs are manageable and contain database/dependency signatures.

metadata.fault_strategy: Do not treat a single expired USSD session as a service failure. Treat compact multi-carrier expiry bursts as channel_tunnel evidence that must be correlated with local process, port, Network Sentinel, adapter, and user-impact signals.
metadata.pii_policy: Subscriber identifiers and raw session keys must be redacted before log-derived signatures leave the host.

channel_tunnel_profile.diagnostic_hint: Local JVM and port may be healthy while the external USSD tunnel/session path is degraded.

services.description: Adapter between USSD entry infrastructure and the txn-mobile-ussd channel service.

certification.notes: Status sample shows stopped; validate whether this is expected in ATE before alerting on runtime absence.

services.description: Smartphone mobile banking channel.

certification.notes: Validate API Gateway and OAuth call path before correlation-ready certification.

services.description: WhatsApp mobile channel.

certification.notes: Status sample shows stopped; validate whether inactive channel is expected.

services.description: Transaction orchestration service. Core path into IDC, Postilion, Zimswitch, Visa, wallet, agency, and notifications.

certification.notes: Critical transaction orchestrator. Restart remains disabled until dependency drains, idempotency, and transaction safety are validated.

services.description: Exact integration service used by Mobile Banking to communicate with the IDC core banking system.

certification.notes: Treat as the Mobile Banking to core-banking boundary. IDC failure evidence should be read through this service until the full IDC agent layer is complete.

services.description: Postilion card transaction integration service.

certification.notes: Validate switch endpoint, timeout budget, and card transaction evidence signatures.

services.description: Zimswitch/ZIPIT integration service. Startup script lists it twice; Nexus keeps one canonical service.

certification.notes: Canonicalized duplicate service entry from startup script.

services.description: Visa integration service from the Mobile Banking script.

certification.notes: Status sample shows stopped; validate whether Visa integration should be enabled in ATE.

services.description: Craft Silicon integration service.

certification.notes: Startup script appears to call CRAFT_SILICON_SERVICE_NAME without variable expansion in bulk start; owner should verify script before restart automation.

services.description: T24 integration service present in script variables; validate whether it is active in the current fabric.

certification.notes: Declared in script variables but not clearly exposed in menu sample; keep catalog-only until owner confirms role.

services.description: E-wallet integration service.

certification.notes: Validate wallet endpoint and transaction flow membership.

services.description: Agency banking channel/service.

certification.notes: Validate whether agency transactions pass through txn-transaction-service for core banking authorization.

services.description: Internet banking channel/service.

certification.notes: Validate business flow and authentication dependencies.

services.description: Notification polling and dispatch worker.

certification.notes: USSD log sample shows notification polling messages; validate queue and DB source before diagnostics-ready certification.

services.description: Administration portal service.

certification.notes: Status sample shows stopped; validate expected ATE posture before creating uptime rules.

services.description: Batch worker service.

certification.notes: Treat as stateful until batch idempotency and schedule windows are confirmed.

services.description: Forwarder worker service.

certification.notes: Status sample shows stopped; validate whether forwarder is intentionally dormant.

services.description: Digital Express integration service.

certification.notes: Status sample shows stopped; validate whether this integration is in current use.

services.description: Equals integration service.

certification.notes: Status sample shows stopped; validate whether this integration is currently in scope.

services.description: Vendor service present in startup script but marked no-more in the shorter service notes.

certification.notes: Marked for owner review because one source says no-more while status sample shows running.

services.description: Cottco validation service present in startup script but marked no-more in the shorter service notes.

certification.notes: Marked for owner review because one source says no-more and status sample shows stopped.

services.description: Database dependency inferred from real USSD logs showing org.postgresql.jdbc.PgConnection and HikariDataSource connection acquisition.

certification.notes: Database host/name must be confirmed from application.yml before diagnostics are enabled.

services.description: Core banking dependency for financial transaction validation. Included as fill-if-missing so this Mobile Banking seed can be applied before or after the IDC layer.

certification.notes: Placeholder only if IDC seed is not yet applied. Existing IDC catalog data wins during merge.

metadata.relationship: financial transaction validation dependency behind txn-integration-idc

clusters.description: Production-mirror Mobile Banking and integration fabric from /srv startup/status/log contracts.

metadata.operational_rule: Stopped in the captured status sample does not automatically mean outage until the owner validates expected ATE service posture.

clusters.description: Customer-facing channel layer for USSD, smartphone, WhatsApp, internet, agency, and API entry.
Core transaction path from channels into transaction orchestration, IDC integration, and core banking validation.
Database fabric inferred from Mobile Banking logs and to be completed from application.yml validation.

business_flows.description: USSD balance enquiry path through adapter, USSD service, local database/settings lookups, transaction service, IDC integration, and IDC core validation.

metadata.fault_strategy: A USSD-only database leak should root at txn-mobile-ussd or txn-mobile-postgres; compact multi-carrier session expiry bursts should root as channel_tunnel evidence unless runtime/database/dependency evidence proves otherwise; IDC should only be blamed when txn-integration-idc or IDC evidence says the fault crosses that boundary.

business_flows.description: Smartphone/API mobile transaction path into transaction orchestration and IDC core validation.
Mobile card-related transaction path through transaction service, Postilion/Zimswitch/Visa switch integrations, and IDC validation where applicable.

metadata.fault_strategy: Switch-specific failures must not automatically blame IDC unless txn-integration-idc or IDC evidence confirms downstream authorization failure.

business_flows.description: Support services that can degrade customer experience without necessarily stopping the core transaction path.

metadata.status_note: Adapter stopped in captured sample; edge is active only if service owner confirms adapter is used in this environment.
metadata.reasoning_rule: If txn-mobile-ussd process and local health are up but compact multi-carrier expiry bursts appear, rank channel_tunnel/session path above JVM restart unless adapter or tunnel evidence says otherwise.

metadata.validation_required: Confirm database name, schema, pool size, and datasource URL from application.yml.

metadata.reasoning_rule: Do not blame IDC from Mobile Banking symptoms unless txn-integration-idc or IDC evidence says the fault crosses this boundary.

fabric_summary.sync_message: Mobile Banking ATE bootstrap catalog contains real service contracts only; no fake incidents or telemetry.
